name: Sun Country Airlines

carryOn.notes: Carry-on bag fee applies unless included with fare bundle. Personal item always included.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does Sun Country charge for carry-on bags?
faqs.answer: Yes, carry-on bag fees start at $30 when purchased online. Personal items are always free.

faqs.question: How many bags can I check on Sun Country?
faqs.answer: You can check multiple bags for a fee. First bag starts at $30 prepaid online.
